title: query_open_items Request
description: Query open items for a project. Sent as HTTP query parameters or JSON body on GET /v1/projects/:project_id/open-items.

project_id.description: Project scope — enforced server-side; provided here for documentation. Clients pass this in the URL path.

status.description: Filter by status values. Omit to return all.

severity.description: Filter by severity values. Omit to return all.

pr_id.description: Filter to a specific PR. Omit for all PRs.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.
